zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Devoroys於1555年2月2日在英國諾福爾可圖斯頓受洗時，他的父親John Devoroys32歲，母親Mrs. Elizabeth Devoroys28歲。他於1580年5月17日與Ursula Pitcher在英國英格蘭諾福爾可哈丁加姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和8個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Hardingham, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可哈丁加姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Devoroys于1555年2月2日在英国諾福爾可圖斯頓受洗时，他的父亲John Devoroys32岁，母亲Mrs. Elizabeth Devoroys28岁。他于1580年5月17日与Ursula Pitcher在英国英格兰諾福爾可哈丁加姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和8个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Devoroys was christened on 2 February 1555, in Thuxton, Norfolk, England, his father, John Devoroys, was 32 and his mother, Mrs. Elizabeth Devoroys, was 28. He married Ursula Pitcher on 17 May 1580, in Hardingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 8 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Devoroys a été baptisé le 2 février 1555, à Thuxton, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, John Devoroys, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Elizabeth Devoroys, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Ursula Pitcher le 17 mai 1580, à Hardingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 8 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Devoroys am 2. Februar 1555 in Thuxton, Norfolk, England getauft wurde, war sein Vater John Devoroys 32 und seine Mutter Mrs. Elizabeth Devoroys 28. Er hat am 17. Mai 1580 in Hardingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Ursula Pitcher geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 8 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Devoroys è stato battezzato il 2 febbraio 1555 nel Thuxton, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, John Devoroys, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Elizabeth Devoroys, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Ursula Pitcher il 17 maggio 1580, nel Hardingham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 8 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Devoroysが1555年2月2日にイギリスノーフォルクスウクストンで洗礼を受けた時，父John Devoroysは32歳，母Mrs. Elizabeth Devoroysは28歳であった。1580年5月17日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクハーディンガムでUrsula Pitcherと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Devoroys(이)가 1555년 2월 2일 영국 노르폴크 스스턴에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그의 아버지 John Devoroys(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Elizabeth Devoroys(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1580년 5월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 하르딩함에서 Ursula Pitcher(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Devoroys foi batizado em 2 de fevereiro de 1555, em Thuxton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Devoroys, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Elizabeth Devoroys, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Ursula Pitcher em 17 de maio de 1580, em Hardingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 8 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Devoroys был крещен 2 февраля 1555 г. в местности тукстон, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Devoroys было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Elizabeth Devoroys, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Ursula Pitcher 17 мая 1580 г. в местности хардингхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmund Devoroys se bautizó el 2 de febrero de 1555, en Thuxton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Devoroys, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Mrs. Elizabeth Devoroys, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Ursula Pitcher el 17 de mayo de 1580, en Hardingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 8 hijas.
